yogurt-ice-cream-with-walnuts-teleculina.name: Yogurt Ice Cream With Walnuts
instructions: Light a pot with sugar, water and lime scrape and boil until you get pearl point. Take it off and let it cool.

Beat the whites separately in castle and cream in whipped cream. In a bowl, gently mix the yoghurts with the previous syrup, cream and whites. Lie in one shape, like English cake, and take it to the freezer until solidify.

Prepare the crispy walnut: light a pot with sugar and water until you get a caramel. Pinch the nuts and add them to the previous preparation. Remove from the fire, lie on the kitchen counter, greased with oil, and let it cool. Then pick it up rough.
When serving, remove balls from the serving ice cream, sprinkle with the crispy walnuts, decorate to taste and serve.

NOTE: PIEROL POINT Fill a spoon with the syrup and slowly pour it into a container. If, when falling, the syrup forms a somewhat resistant thread and, at its end, a ball appears, the syrup has reached the pearl point.

yogurt-marinated-grilled-chicken.name: Yogurt-marinated Grilled Chicken

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped fresh cilantro leaves and stems
Olive oil plus more for brushing
Kosher salt plus more for seasoning

instructions: {'level': 'step', 'text': 'Working with one chicken breast at a time, put chicken between 2 sheets of waxed paper and pound to 1/2'}
{'level': 'step', 'text': 'Transfer chicken breasts to a resealable plastic bag.'}

{'level': 'step', 'text': 'Combine the remaining ingredients in a food processor and blend until smooth. Pour yogurt mixture over chicken, seal bag, and turn to coat. Marinate chicken in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours or overnight.'}
{'level': 'step', 'text': 'Build a medium fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to medium-high. Brush grill grates with oil.'}
{'level': 'step', 'text': 'Scrape excess marinade off chicken; season with salt. Grill chicken, turning once, until browned and cooked through, 3-4 minutes per side.'}

yummy-peanut-butter-cup-ice-cream.name: Yummy Peanut Butter Cup Ice Cream
instructions: Heat milk in a saucepan over medium heat without boiling until steaming, about 4 minutes. Beat egg yolks and sugar in a large bowl. Slowly whisk hot milk into yolk mixture until well mixed; return mixture to saucepan and continue to cook on medium heat.
Gradually stir peanut butter and vanilla extract into milk mixture until thoroughly combined, about 5 minutes. Pour peanut mixture into large bowl and cool for 15 minutes.
Stir heavy cream and peanut butter cups into milk mixture, pour into an ice cream maker, and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
